## Definition of Done Checklist

### Eric's Gate
- [ ] Code runs first time — no manual steps required
- [ ] Lint passes — zero errors in files touched
- [ ] TypeScript compiles — zero type errors
- [ ] Every new route wired in `App.tsx`
- [ ] Every new API route mounted on `protectedRoutes`
- [ ] All dev servers stopped — ports clear
- [ ] No `value=""` on any ShadCN `SelectItem`
- [ ] Browser opened — every new route navigated, not blank

### Vera's Sign-Off
- [ ] Browser-verified — every new URL navigated and listed below
- [ ] Primary action tested — form submits, record appears
- [ ] Edge cases tested — empty inputs, missing required fields, invalid data
- [ ] Browser console clean — zero errors

**Routes verified:**
- [ ] [list routes here]

**Vera's verdict:** [ PASS / CONDITIONAL PASS / BLOCKED ]

### Decisions Logged
- [ ] Every architectural decision made in this PR is filed in `.squad/decisions/`
- [ ] No decisions exist only in this PR description or chat history

### Superman's Smoke Test
- [ ] Personally verified every new route renders with data
